title: Elytra Lock
description: Client side fabric mod to lock elytra usage using a keybind.
body:
# elytra-lock

A client-side fabric (quilt-compatible) mod which allows you to lock elytra functionality. It registers a keybind (by default, `J`) which can be used to toggle the lock. ## Usage When locked, it is impossible to fly or equip the elytra with right-click - it is possible to equip to it manually, by shift-clicking or dragging it onto the chestplate slot. If the elytra is locked when it is already equipped or equipped manually, flight is disabled.
